Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ZJ GROUP INC.'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS

Appearances: Ravi D. Sahae of Leland Parachini Steinberg Matzger & Melnick LLP (415.957.1800) for plaintiff and responding party; Stephen C. Seto of Bergquist Wood McIntosh Seto LLP (925.938.6100) for defendant and moving party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. The motion to expunge is denied as moot, Lis Pendens withdrawn on July 27, 2017. Motion is GRANTED as to the request for attorney's fees. This motion was filed on July 17, 2017. Sometime during the week of July 17, 2017, after this motion was prepared and filed, Plaintiff settled this action with co-Defendant NRT West. Only at that point Plaintiff was ready and willing to voluntarily withdraw the lis pendens and dismiss the action. (Sahae Declartion, paragraph 7). Moving party is entitled to recover fees incurred in filing this motion. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
